title: Anticipation
description: A predicted future state or action with confidence, risk assessment, and routing information

trigger.description: The condition or event that triggers this anticipation

confidence.description: Confidence level for this anticipation (0.0 to 1.0)

suggested_action.description: The recommended action to take based on this anticipation

risk_level.description: Risk level associated with this anticipation

requires_confirmation.description: Whether human confirmation is required before acting on this anticipation

agent_to_route_to.description: The agent or service that should handle this anticipation
